　　　　　  加里·奥德曼 Gary Oldman


◎简　　介  

　　In England 'football' was a dirty word. The game was in disgrace...James Erskine brings it all back, the hooliganism, the state of English football and that fateful night in Turin. This documentary is a mixed bag of generally well written narrative spoken by Gary Oldman, real footage of games, unseen footage and English footballs bad name. This all works really well apart from...
